title: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 Meta-Schema
description: Schema describing the structure of a JSON Schema document conforming to Draft 2020-12, the latest stable version of the JSON Schema specification used for validating JSON data.

$id.description: Identifies the schema resource with a URI.

$schema.description: Declares the JSON Schema dialect this schema conforms to.

$defs.description: An object containing schema definitions for reuse within this schema.

$anchor.description: Creates a plain name anchor for referencing within the schema.

$dynamicRef.description: A dynamic reference resolved at evaluation time.

$dynamicAnchor.description: Creates a dynamic anchor that can be overridden by referencing schemas.

$vocabulary.description: Declares the vocabularies required and optional for this schema.

$comment.description: A comment for schema maintainers, not used in validation.

title.description: A short summary of the schema's purpose.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the schema's purpose.

default.description: A default value for the instance.

examples.description: Example values conforming to this schema.

deprecated.description: Indicates whether the schema is deprecated.

readOnly.description: Indicates the value is managed by the owning authority and should not be modified.

writeOnly.description: Indicates the value should never be visible in responses.

type.description: The data type(s) allowed for the instance.

enum.description: The instance value must be equal to one of the elements in this array.

const.description: The instance value must be equal to this value.

allOf.description: The instance must be valid against all of the subschemas.

anyOf.description: The instance must be valid against at least one of the subschemas.

oneOf.description: The instance must be valid against exactly one of the subschemas.

not.description: The instance must not be valid against this schema.

properties.description: Validation schemas for object properties by name.

patternProperties.description: Validation schemas for properties matching regex patterns.

additionalProperties.description: Schema for properties not matched by 'properties' or 'patternProperties'.

propertyNames.description: Schema that all property names must conform to.

required.description: Properties that must be present in the object.

dependentRequired.description: Properties required when a given property is present.

dependentSchemas.description: Schemas applied when a given property is present.

prefixItems.description: Schemas for validating array items by position (tuple validation).

contains.description: Schema that at least one array item must match.

minItems.description: Minimum number of items in an array.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of items in an array.

uniqueItems.description: Whether all items in the array must be unique.

multipleOf.description: The numeric value must be a multiple of this number.

pattern.description: Regex pattern the string must match.

format.description: Semantic format identifier for string validation.

contentMediaType.description: MIME type of the string content.

contentEncoding.description: Encoding of the string content (e.g., base64).

unevaluatedItems.description: Schema for array items not evaluated by other keywords.

unevaluatedProperties.description: Schema for object properties not evaluated by other keywords.
